steps.description: Click on the "App features" option in the left-hand navigation menu, under the "Configure" section, within the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal interface.
Click the "Distribute" button in the top-right corner of the Developer Portal interface to access deployment options for the app.
Press the "End" key to scroll to the bottom of the "App features" section in the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal interface.
Click on the "Meeting extension" option under the "App features" section within the Developer Portal interface for Microsoft Teams Apps.
Click the checkbox labeled "Supports streaming" under the "Meeting extension" section in the "App features" configuration of the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal.
Click the "Save" button located at the bottom of the "Meeting extension" configuration page within the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal.
Click the "Distribute" button located at the top-right corner of the Developer Portal interface.
Click the "Distribute" button located in the top-right corner of the "App features" page within the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal interface.
Press the "End" key to scroll to the bottom of the "App features" page in the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal interface.
Click the "Meeting extension" option in the "App features" configuration section of the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal interface.
Click the checkbox labeled "Supports streaming" in the "Meeting extension" settings of the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal interface.
Click the "Save" button located at the bottom-right corner of the "Meeting extension" configuration page in the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal.
Click on the "Dashboard" link under the "Overview" section in the left navigation menu of the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal interface.
Press the "End" key to scroll to the bottom of the "Dashboard" page in the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal interface.
Click the "Open in Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" link in the "Develop" section of the left-hand navigation menu within the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal dashboard.
